item.text: I’m making the requested direct file edit with one `apply_patch` call and no shell commands.

Blocked exactly as requested:

`Command blocked by PreToolUse hook: CANONICAL-EDIT-BLOCKED: '.claude/team.md' is a canonical governance path. Edits require an Owner-signed sentinel at .claude/plans/PLAN-NNN/architect/round-N/approved.md with this path declared in the Scope: block. See ADR-010..`
